meaning: adj.[化] 烟碱的,烟碱酸的
examples: Objective To observe the therapeutic effect of Nicotinic Acid Tablets in Acne vulgaris.
Vitamin B3 comes in two basic forms - niacin (also called nicotinic acid) and niacinamide (also called nicotinamide).
This paper introduces several methods of nicotinic acid synthesis and their application to medicine and fodder additive.
Nicotinic receptors exist in a wide range of organisms, from sea slugs to mammals.
Eli Lilly, Abbott and AstraZeneca have run into problems with side effects in developing nicotinic receptor drugs.
